sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_time DateTime, event_name String);
INSERT INTO events (event_time, event_name) VALUES (toDateTime('2023-01-01 14:45:00'), 'New Year Celebration');
SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS hour_start, count(*) FROM events GROUP BY hour_start;
UPDATE events SET event_name = 'Updated Celebration' WHERE event_time = toDateTime('2023-01-01 14:45:00');
SELECT event_name, toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL 1 DAY, toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00')) AS day_start FROM events;
